top_signals.title: China Patrols Scarborough Shoal After Philippines Warns of Threat
top_signals.summary: China's military and coast guard said they carried out patrols near disputed waters in the South China Sea on Sunday, a day after the Philippines said it remained under threat from Beijing despite a recent easing in U.S.-China tensions.Philippine and U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Military Says it Fired Missile into Engine Room of Blockade Runner
top_signals.summary: The U.S. military says it fired a missile into the engine room of a vessel trying to get through the U.S. blockade of Iran on Friday.In a statement on Saturday, U.S. Central Command said it fired a Hellfire missile into the engine room of the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia jumps into PCs with new Arm-based chip debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP
top_signals.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang unveiled a long-awaited Arm-based PC chip, breaking into PCs for the first time on new laptops by Dell, Microsoft, HP, ASUS and others.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SoftBank overtakes Toyota after more than 20 years to become Japan’s largest company
top_signals.summary: Demand for AI stocks powers tech giant’s shares as it takes top spot by market capitalisation
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
